---
title: "Introduction"
description: "Welcome to the Petstore API documentation"
---

Welcome to the Petstore API. This documentation covers all endpoints for managing pets and orders.

## Overview

The Petstore API is a RESTful API that lets you manage a virtual pet store.

## Getting Started

To get started, you'll need an API key. Contact the administrator to request one.

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" https://api.petstore.com/v1/pets
```
